Text.Page:
A scouting team marked an area near the underground graveyard that's ideal for infiltration. It's our best chance to do some serious damage where it counts.

Take this to Kalraz and he'll come up with a strategy.

Interesting idea, but we're going to need some bombs. We'll never get in otherwise.

A transport carriage was destroyed nearby. Head through this cave and go investigate the wreckage to see if it has anything left that we can use.
Well? Did you find the carriage?<NEXTPAGEBUTTON>"There was nothing left."</NEXTPAGEBUTTON>

Nothing? Perhaps the bombs blew and caused the fire.

Well, that spoils my attack plan. Time to go to plan B, whatever that is.

Thanks for your help.
